examples: Indonesia, with 216 million people, is the fourth most populous country in the world.
Nigeria is the most populous African country and an economic powerhouse for the continent.
The central state, though often very rich and very populous, was intrinsically fragile.
The census in the EU's most populous country was carried out on 9 May, 2011.
The latest figures count Hispanics as the most populous and fastest growing minority group.
